text_block_list.name: Fans by the Stage
text_block_list.text:
Suzukaaa! You can do it!<n><chrname>! I'm
here to<n>cheer for you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sounds like we drew quite the crowd<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes... and why wouldn't we? Wishes<n>are, after all,
explosive catalysts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hope attempts to peer into the<n>possible, to
discover the "what ifs?"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But a wish wills the possible into<n>being,
augmenting potential with<n>expectation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The masses, in their foolishness, fail<n>to distinguish
between the two,<n>loading their own desires onto
others.
choice_data_list: But that can be a source of power.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Are you going to get changed? It's<n>almost time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, silly me! You truly are a pure<n>soul.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But that is precisely why you are able<n>to achieve
pure growth... You have<n>proven a most excellent
sample.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> and the other<n>performers all
gather by the stage,<n>ready to go out for our fourth
concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see them off into the spotlight with<n>the wish that
this will be yet another<n>opportunity for them to
grow.
